label: Wake
say: My body is strong and energized.
My mind is calm and clear.
Today I will make progress toward my goals.

label: Brush
say: My legs are powerful and grounded.
I am grateful for this new morning.
I commit to small daily improvements.

label: Coffee
say: I nourish my body with intention.
I am focused and ready to plan my day.
I prioritize what matters most.

label: In Car (1)
say: My core is stable and supported.
I use every moment to build strength.
I am consistent in my discipline.

label: Parking (1)
say: My abdomen is strong and engaged.
I arrive with energy and purpose.
I show up fully for today's work.

label: Keynaan
say: My shoulders carry strength, not tension.
I release midday stress with breath.
I am halfway to completing my day.

label: In Car (2)
say: My core remains steady throughout the day.
I use transitions to reset and recharge.
I stay on track with my commitments.

label: Parking (2)
say: My body grows stronger with each rep.
I return with renewed focus and clarity.
Every small action compounds over time.

label: In Car (3)
say: My posture reflects my inner strength.
I release the day's tension mindfully.
I am proud of the work I've done today.

label: EBRF
say: My legs carry me forward with power.
I transition into my evening with gratitude.
I honour the end of my work with movement.

label: Yard
say: I am grounded and connected to the earth.
Nature restores my mind and spirit.
I invest in my long-term wellbeing.

label: Read
say: My body is winding down with grace.
I feed my mind with wisdom each evening.
I am building the life I envision.

label: Water
say: I hydrate and care for this body.
I reflect on today with honesty and kindness.
I celebrate what I accomplished today.

label: Meditate
say: My breath steadies my nervous system.
I am at peace with this moment.
I set clear intentions for tomorrow.

label: Sleep
say: I release all tension from my body.
I am grateful for this day.
Tomorrow I will be even better.
